name: Rakurou Hizutome
description: Rakurou, better known by his nickname "Sunraku," is an enthusiast of Kusoge (shit games); games that are well-known for buggy states, unfair mechanics and awful AI. He is well known by his friends as a Kusoge fanatic and lunatic. Thanks to the skills Sunraku has built up playing such awful games, he becomes a more motivated and better player the crappier the hand a game deals him.

name: Tsubaki Nakatsukasa
description: A demon weapon partnered with [Black Star](https://anilist.co/character/8464/BlackStar) hailing from the Nakatsukasa Clan, a special weapons clan who are direct descendants of demon weapons created by the mother of magic weapons, Arachne Gorgon. Having inherited the unique Multi-Form Ability of her clan, she joined the DWMA to stop her brother from becoming a kishin, becoming fast friends with [Black Star](https://anilist.co/character/8464/BlackStar) in the process. name: Nozomi Toujou
description: __Height:__ 159 cm Nozomi is the vice-president of Otonokizaka High School. She is the best friend of Eli. She is also a Shrine Maiden in a temple because she believes that a shrine is the source of people's faith. Eventually she will join the school idol club with Eli and will be one of the most successful school idols. (Source: Character Book)

Due to his role and characteristics, he is full of curiosity. Amongst androids of the same type, 9S is comparatively varied in his emotional expressions.

name: Anju Emma
description: Anju Emma is a platoon member and later platoon leader of the Eighty-Sixth Strike Package's Spearhead Squadron. She serves as their support fire and artillery provider. Her Personal Name is Snow Witch. Having survived four years on the Eastern Front and the Special Reconnaissance Mission, she is considered one of the most elite Processors alive.

name: Amo Empool

Whilst appearing sweet and almost childlike, she is easily made emotional and will lash out at others if provoked. Amo's vital instrument is a pair of watchmen series boots, which when worn together, can produce a 'smell'. name: Michel Bollinger
nativeName: ミシェル・ボランジェ
description: __Height:__ 182 cm __From year:__ 1099 The youngest son of the Bollinger family. Lives all alone in the ill-fated manor where all the windows are shuttered or boarded up, draping it in darkness. It would seem he has little interest in engaging with the outside world. Michel seldom smiles, keeping his emotions locked up inside, but that is scarcely surprising, him having spent so much of his days in solitude.

name: Mumei
description: A mysterious, arrogant and playful yet exceedingly strong and brave girl who arrives at Aragane Station with unclear intent. She's very proficient with firearms and thrown weaponry, as well as incredibly strong physically, being able to chop off a Kabane's head clean off - using a blade concealed in her sandal - with one swift kick. Despite often appearing ruthless and full of bloodlust, she's great with kids.

name: Sakaki
description: __Height:__ 174 cm Sakaki is a quiet, stylish girl. Looking cool and distant, she's often seem staring out of the window. Being tall and well-endowed in both athletics and body, she's often admired by many girls in the school where Azumanga Daioh takes place. Despite being tall, cool and aloof or distant, deep in her heart she wishes to be small, soft, and cute, like Chiyo-chan, but she perceives that she can't - because of her height. name: Douma
description: __Height:__ 187 cm (6'1½") He is Upper Moon Two, making him the third-strongest demon after Muzan and Upper Moon One. He has a very friendly attitude, and fights with a pair of metal fans. He is the founder of a cult known as the "Eternal Paradise Cult," and eats his followers, allegedly in order to release them from the pain of living. ~!He is the demon who killed Shinobu Kochou's older sister and Shinobu, as well as Inosuke's mother.!~

name: Yoshino
description: The second spirit saved by Shido. Yoshino is a shy girl who is said to be the Kindest spirit up to date. Her codename is Hermit. ~!Other than Yoshino, she has her other personality named Yoshinon which is the rabbit in her left arm. Yoshino says it's her hero for protecting her from bad guys (which are the ASTs). It is also said that Yoshino created Yoshinon in order to restrain herself from hurting humans.!~

description: Minako is the fourth member of the Sailor Team to be discovered by Sailor Moon, and serves as the leader of the Guardian Senshi who protect her. She uses love-related powers. In the manga and anime series she dreams of becoming a famous idol, whereas in the live-action series her character is refactored to already be a celebrity. name: Shion
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") Shion is a main character in the manga and anime No.6. He is kind and understands people. He doesn't seem amazed by No.6 even though he lives there. He also feels that something about the city is weird - something just feels wrong. Initially, he had brown hair and hazel brown eyes. He has an amazing IQ level, proven by his acceptance into the Special Course. ~!His appearance changed due to a form of disease he acquired from some substance emitted by a bee in his body.!~

name: Karen Kohiruimaki
description: __Height:__ 183cm (6'0") Karen is a female college student who has a complex about her tall figure and has a poor social disposition because of it. In Gun Gale Online, she obtains a dream "chibi" avatar less than 150 centimeters in height that dons a full-body pink uniform. She has excellent agility and specializes in close-range combat that utilizes her speed. She loves cute things, and all of her equipment is pink. Her main arm is P90 and she calls it "P-Chan".

name: Shichika Yasuri
description: Shichika is the current head of the Kyotouryuu style. He was trained rigorously by his father, the previous head of the style. He is deeply dedicated to his training, and is strong enough to win against challengers without even using Kyotouryuu. Through the years, he has even developed new moves for the Kyotouryuu style. name: Bulat
description: Bulat was once a high-ranking Imperial Officer known as "100 Man-Slayer Bulat". He later decided to betray the Empire when his superior was framed for not giving in to the Prime Minister's agenda. Bulat became disgusted with the Empire that cared more for bribes, than merit regardless of how hard he worked. After leaving the Empire, he joined the Revolutionaries, and eventually Night Raid. name: Ryou Kurokiba
description: Ryou Kurokiba is a 92nd Toutsuki Generation Student and Alice Nakiri's aide. Generally lazy and gloomy, Ryou's personality drastically shifts once he puts on his bandana, becoming aggressive, short-tempered, and brash. He grew up in a port town in Denmark, where he became the head chef of a pub due to his commanding personality and great skill.
